name: Chilled Tomato-Yogurt Soup (Weir)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a strainer with 2 to 3 coffee filters or cheesecloth. Set over a bowl and place the yogurt in the strainer.
2. Refrigerate for 2 hours to allow the whey (liquid) to drip from the yogurt. Discard the liquid and transfer the yogurt to a medium bowl.
3. Add the tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, dill, and milk to the yogurt. Stir well until combined.
4. Puree the mixture in batches using a blender until smooth.
5. Pour the pureed soup into a bowl, add the vinegar, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Chill for at least 1 hour.
7. At serving time, ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with dill sprigs.
8. Makes 6 servings (about 6 cups).
